channel.title: wave on Geophydog
channel.description: Recent content in wave on Geophydog

item.title: Numerical Modeling of Acoustic Wave Propagation
item.description: 1 Basic princeples The acoustic wave equation in vector form given by $$ p_{tt}=c^2 \nabla^2 p \tag{1} $$ where, $p$ the acoustic pressure, $c$ is the propagation speed of acoutic wave, and $\nabla^2$ denotes the $Laplacian$ operator. To be continued …
